reasoning: XLK -0.97%, XLF -0.81%, XLE -0.53% all negative — classic risk-off rotation. Tech leadership has broken, financials stressed, and energy flat. No sector support for SPY. VIX +5.21% rising into HIGH IV regime confirms fear is rising. SPY down 1.04% but outperformed by all three sectors, indicating concentrated selling in smaller/non-mega-cap components. Bearish bias with high confidence: sector breadth deteriorating, internals confirm downside continuation.
key_observations: XLK -0.97%: Tech selling — growth/momentum leadership broken heading into cash open
XLF -0.81%: Financial stress despite typically holding better — rate/credit concerns
All three sectors aligned DOWN: Clear risk-off rotation, no bullish anchor
VIX +5.21% rising to HIGH regime: Fear escalating, volatility expanding
Sectors outperform SPY despite all negative: Indicates non-mega-cap weakness, concentration of selling
